title: Fresh First Person
description: A simple mod that shows the 3rd person player model in 1st person. But with supporting Fresh Animations.
body:
A simple mod that shows the 3rd person player model in 1st person while working with Fresh Animations: Player Extension. (optional)

Highly recommended to use Fresh Animations: Player Extension!!

Download FreshLX's resourcepack! https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension

Still working on porting to Fabric, Neoforge, Forge 1.21.x
